transformations.name: Get_Agreements
transformations.user_code:
import pyspark.sql.functions as f 
import os
import sys
import pytest

from datetime import datetime
from functools import reduce

from pyspark.sql import DataFrame
from pyspark.sql.functions import coalesce, col, datediff, lag, lit, lower, udf, broadcast, date_add, expr,regexp_replace,concat,count 
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType,StructField, StringType, IntegerType
from datetime import datetime, date, timedelta

def calculate_hvs_execution_date(hist_execution_date_str, use_hist_execution_date, reportingLag):
    
    if hist_execution_date_str == None:
        hist_execution_date_str = ''
    if use_hist_execution_date == None:
        use_hist_execution_date = 'N'  
    if use_hist_execution_date == '':
        use_hist_execution_date = 'N'         
        
    if use_hist_execution_date == "Y" and (hist_execution_date_str != ''):
        hist_execution_date = datetime.strptime(hist_execution_date_str, "%Y-%m-%d")
        if reportingLag == 2 and hist_execution_date.weekday() in (0,1):
            return f"'{(hist_execution_date + timedelta(-2-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"
        elif reportingLag == 2 and hist_execution_date.weekday() not in (0,1):
            return f"'{(hist_execution_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"
        elif reportingLag == 1 and hist_execution_date.weekday() == 0:
            return f"'{(hist_execution_date + timedelta(-2-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"   
        elif reportingLag == 1 and hist_execution_date.weekday() != 0:
            return f"'{(hist_execution_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"               
        else:
            return f"'{(hist_execution_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"
    else:
        current_date = datetime.now()
        if reportingLag == 2 and current_date.weekday() in (0,1):
            return f"'{(current_date + timedelta(-2-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"
        elif reportingLag == 2 and current_date.weekday() not in (0,1):
            return f"'{(current_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"
        elif reportingLag == 1 and current_date.weekday() == 0:
            return f"'{(current_date + timedelta(-2-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"   
        elif reportingLag == 1 and current_date.weekday() != 0:
            return f"'{(current_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"           
        else:
            return f"'{(current_date + timedelta(-reportingLag)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}'"


hist_execution_date = f"${hist_execution_date}"
use_hist_execution_date = f"${use_hist_execution_date}"
reportingLag = ${reportingLag}

execution_date = calculate_hvs_execution_date(hist_execution_date,use_hist_execution_date,reportingLag)

######Uncomment This Once you gain access on S3 PROD and comment the Snowflake Source
#financial_posting_ss_v_df = spark.read.parquet("s3://datalake-prod-processed-s3/eas/bdp_eas/FINANCIAL_POSTING/").where(f"  edi_business_day = {execution_date} AND edi_business_day IS NOT NULL ")
#financial_posting_ss_v_df = financial_posting_ss_v_df.select("agrmnt_id_bal_acct","fin_evnt_pstd_dt","agrmnt_sbtyp_cd","edi_business_day").repartition(200)
#financial_posting_ss_v_df.createOrReplaceTempView("financial_posting_ss_v")

#read_financial_posting_table = spark.sql(f""" SELECT DISTINCT fp.agrmnt_id_bal_acct,fp.edi_business_day FROM financial_posting_ss_v fp WHERE fp.edi_business_day = {execution_date} AND fp.agrmnt_sbtyp_cd='MTA' """)

# queryString= f""" SELECT DISTINCT fp.agrmnt_id_bal_acct,fp.fin_evnt_pstd_dt as edi_business_day,(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NULL ORDER BY NULL))%${jdbcReadParallelism} rnumModPartition FROM ${sfDatabase}.${sfSchema}.${sfTargetTable} fp 
# INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.AGREEMENT agr on fp.agrmnt_id_bal_acct=agr.agrmnt_id
# INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT cust_acct on trim(cast(agr.AGRMNT_ACCT_NUM as string))=trim(cast(cust_acct.account_no as string)) and trim(cast(agr.AGRMNT_BRNCH_NUM as string))=trim(cast(cust_acct.branch_no as string))
# INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.CUSTOMER cust on trim(cast(cust.customer_id as string))=trim(cast(cust_acct.customer_id as string)) and relation_type='OWN'
# INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.ORG_MODEL_HIER ORG on cust.PORTFOLIO_CODE=ORG.PFOLIO and DIRPOSNAME2 = 'MD BUSINESS BANKING'
# WHERE fp.fin_evnt_pstd_dt = {execution_date} """

queryString= f""" SELECT fp.agrmnt_id_bal_acct,fp.fin_evnt_pstd_dt as edi_business_day,
cust_acct.customer_id,(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NULL ORDER BY NULL))%${jdbcReadParallelism} rnumModPartition
FROM ${sfDatabase}.${sfSchema}.${sfTargetTable} fp 
INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.AGREEMENT agr on fp.agrmnt_id_bal_acct=agr.agrmnt_id
INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT cust_acct on cast(trim(agr.AGRMNT_ACCT_NUM) as int)=cast(trim(cust_acct.account_no) as int) and cast(trim(agr.AGRMNT_BRNCH_NUM) as int)=cast(trim(cust_acct.branch_no) as int)
WHERE fp.fin_evnt_pstd_dt = {execution_date}
AND cust_acct.relation_type IN('OWN','OWJ')
AND RLIKE(TRIM(CASE WHEN NVL(agr.AGRMNT_ACCT_NUM,'') = '' THEN '99999999' WHEN agr.AGRMNT_ACCT_NUM = '' THEN '99999999' ELSE agr.AGRMNT_ACCT_NUM END), '^[0-9]+')
AND  RLIKE(TRIM(CASE WHEN NVL(agr.AGRMNT_BRNCH_NUM,'') = '' THEN '99999999' WHEN agr.AGRMNT_BRNCH_NUM = '' THEN '99999999' ELSE agr.AGRMNT_BRNCH_NUM END), '^[0-9]+') """

read_bb_base_data_df  = spark.read.format("jdbc")\
                                    .option("user", "${sfUser}")\
                                    .option("password","${sfPassword}")\
                                    .option("db", "${sfDatabase}")\
                                    .option("role", "${sfRole}")\
                                    .option("schema", "${sfSchema}")\
                                    .option("warehouse", "${sfWarehouse}")\
                                    .option("driver", "com.snowflake.client.jdbc.SnowflakeDriver")\
                                    .option("url", "${sfJDBCURL}")\
                                    .option("dbtable", f" ( {queryString} ) tbl ")\
                                    .option("partitionColumn", "rnumModPartition")\
                                    .option("lowerBound", "0")\
                                    .option("upperBound", "${jdbcReadParallelism}")\
                                    .option("numPartitions", "${jdbcReadParallelism}")\
                                    .option("fetchsize", "1000")\
                                    .load()

bucket           = "${bucket}"
path             = "${bucketPath}" + "hvs_infer_agreement_ids_intermediate/"
full_bucket_path = bucket+path

read_bb_base_data_df.drop("rnumModPartition").distinct().repartition(200).write.mode("overwrite").format("parquet").save(full_bucket_path)

read_bb_base_data_df = spark.read.parquet(full_bucket_path)

queryString= f""" SELECT cust.customer_id,(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NULL ORDER BY NULL))%${jdbcReadParallelism} rnumModPartition FROM ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.CUSTOMER cust INNER JOIN ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT cust_acct ON(cust.customer_id = cust_acct.customer_id AND cust_acct.relation_type='OWN')
INNER join ENT_PRD.TIER1_PRS.ORG_MODEL_HIER ORG on cust.PORTFOLIO_CODE=ORG.PFOLIO and DIRPOSNAME2 = 'MD BUSINESS BANKING' """

read_bb_customer_df = spark.read.format("jdbc")\
                                    .option("user", "${sfUser}")\
                                    .option("password","${sfPassword}")\
                                    .option("db", "${sfDatabase}")\
                                    .option("role", "${sfRole}")\
                                    .option("schema", "${sfSchema}")\
                                    .option("warehouse", "${sfWarehouse}")\
                                    .option("driver", "com.snowflake.client.jdbc.SnowflakeDriver")\
                                    .option("url", "${sfJDBCURL}")\
                                    .option("dbtable", f" ( {queryString} ) tbl ")\
                                    .option("partitionColumn", "rnumModPartition")\
                                    .option("lowerBound", "0")\
                                    .option("upperBound", "${jdbcReadParallelism}")\
                                    .option("numPartitions", "${jdbcReadParallelism}")\
                                    .option("fetchsize", "1000")\
                                    .load()

read_bb_customer_df = read_bb_customer_df.drop("rnumModPartition").distinct()

read_bb_base_data_df.createOrReplaceTempView("BizBankBaseData");
read_bb_customer_df.createOrReplaceTempView("BizBankCustomerData");

read_financial_posting_table = spark.sql(f""" SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(cust) */	 cust_acct.agrmnt_id_bal_acct, cust_acct.edi_business_day,(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NULL ORDER BY NULL))%${jdbcReadParallelism} rnumModPartition FROM BizBankBaseData cust_acct INNER JOIN BizBankCustomerData cust ON(cust.customer_id=cust_acct.customer_id) """)

read_financial_posting_table = read_financial_posting_table.drop("rnumModPartition").distinct()

bucket           = "${bucket}"
path             = "${bucketPath}" + "hvs_infer_agreement_ids/"
full_bucket_path = bucket+path

#read_financial_posting_table.repartition(200).write.option("partitionOverwriteMode","dynamic").partitionBy("edi_business_day").mode("${S3fileWriteMode}").format("${fileWriteFormat}").save(full_bucket_path)

output = read_financial_posting_table

transformations.name: Trash_2
transformations.description: Placeholder Writer for StreamSets null/trash destination 'com_streamsets_pipeline_spark_destination_dev_NullDTarget'. Replace with the real target.

conversion_notes: Origin 'Dev Random 1' (com_streamsets_pipeline_spark_origin_dev_DevRandomDOrigin) is a StreamSets dev/test origin; emitted a placeholder Relational source — set the real connection/table.
Destination 'Trash 2' (com_streamsets_pipeline_spark_destination_dev_NullDTarget) is a StreamSets null/trash target; emitted a placeholder Relational target — set the real connection/table.
StreamSets cluster/compute settings (Databricks/EMR) preserved under source_metadata.cluster_settings; map these to a BigHammer compute config (engine_config only carries Spark properties).
